Lodgical Solution PMS: Built for Every Property Type

Simplify operations, enhance guest experiences, and manage everything from check-in to revenue, all from one intuitive platform.
Book A Demo

Why Lodgical Solution PMS?

Lodgical Solution is more than a PMS—it’s a key part of the Zucchetti North America technology ecosystem. Designed for performance, flexibility, and ease of use, Lodgical integrates seamlessly with POS, CRS, RMS, and other critical systems to help you run smarter from front desk to back office.

When you choose Lodgical Solution, you're choosing:

A unified platform where reservations, guest data, payments, and reporting all flow in real time
A consistent, configurable experience that supports everything from boutique inns to high-traffic campgrounds and marinas
A vendor who provides live U.S.-based support and continues to improve through client feedback

With Zucchetti, you’re not just buying software—you’re investing in a smarter, connected future for your operations.

Book A Demo

Who It’s For

Perfect for Managing:
  • Hotels & Resorts
  • Vacation Rentals, Condo Hotels/Resorts & Timeshares
  • Campgrounds & RV Parks
  • Marinas & Slip Holders
  • Hospitality Houses
Lodgical adapts to your property type, whether you rent out rooms, cabins, campsites, or boat slips.

How Lodgical Solution Works

A flexible, feature-rich platform built to handle every aspect of property operations:

Reservation Management

Handle single bookings or group reservations with ease. Manage guest profiles, availability, rates, and inventory in real time—no double entry, no headaches.

Front Desk Operations

Manage check-ins and check-outs, assign rooms or slips, update folios, and complete everyday front desk tasks from a centralized dashboard.

Housekeeping & Maintenance

Keep your property running smoothly with tools to assign housekeeping duties, monitor room status, schedule maintenance tasks, and trigger real-time alerts.

Point of Sale Integration

Easily integrate with many POS systems, including TCPOS to manage restaurant tabs, retail purchases, and activity fees. Post directly to guest folios for a smooth billing experience.

Reporting & Analytics

Gain visibility into your business performance with dynamic reports on occupancy, revenue, payments, taxes, and trends. Make smarter decisions backed by data. This Eliminates the need for a traditional night audit.

Communication Tools

Automate guest communication through pre-arrival messages, confirmations, reminders, and thank-you notes via email or SMS.

Ticketing & Event Management

Sell and manage tickets for tours, events, or property amenities directly in the platform—ideal for campgrounds, resorts, and activity-driven destinations.

Theme Park Ticketing

Buy theme park tickets or season passes online, enabling secure entry via wristband. Payment processing can be easily done using POS kiosks at properties with multiple guest touchpoints.

Multi-Property Support

Oversee multiple locations from a single login. Customize user roles, share data between properties, and manage centralized reporting—all with cloud-based flexibility.

Why Properties Love Lodgical Solution

  • All-in-one platform: PMS, ticketing, POS integration, and more
  • Designed and supported by a hospitality-focused team—one call for your tech stack
  • Flexible for any property, from marinas and motels to resorts and RV parks
  • Supported by real hospitality experts, not call center scripts
  • Seamlessly integrates with the full Zucchetti North America ecosystem
  • Constantly improving based on real user feedback and industry needs

We don’t just install software—we help you thrive.

Contact Us

North America

Zucchetti North America offers hospitality solutions to hotels and other lodging providers, as well as on-site dining operations across North America.
